description: Product Specification: Material: stainless steel Dimensions: Handle’s length: 9.5 inch; The bowl’s diameter: 4 inch; The bowl’s depth: 0.4 inch DON'T MICROWAVE - FRY IT! This handy set of strainer/skimmers let you warm up frozen foods the right way in a big pot of boiling oil. You can get restaurant quality fries, fried vegetables, fried meats and more. No more wimpy microwave food. Enjoy the real thing with a fabulous hot home cooked meal.It can filter out excess waste, grease blocks. CATCHES FOOD ITEMS SECURELY so they aren't falling off or dropping back into the hot oil or water. The concave mesh is strong and supported with a dual wire handle that won't bend or give way. We have also added very attractive sure-grip handles that look great while making the strainers very easy to hold. You can lift heavy food without worrying about dropping it or it slipping out of your hand.
